steps.description: The student inspects a black GoPro.
The student accidentally turns on the black GoPro.
The student changes the old battery for the GoPro.
The student closes the left battery door of the GoPro.
The student changes the old micro SD Card to a new one.
The student turns on the black GoPro by pushing the side button.
The student turns off the GoPro by pushing the side button.
The student mounts the black strap onto the GoPro.
The student disassembles the bottom strap from the GoPro.
The student mounts the black handheld grip onto the GoPro.
The student tightens the black handheld grip.
The student removes the handheld grip from the GoPro.
